about_item: SILICONE DOG BOWLS: made of high quality silicone material,these collapsible dog bowls are safer than plastic bowls, more healthy to your pets and easy to clean. Dishwasher safe! Perfect dog travel water bowls for adventures, road trips, hiking, camping, or any outdoor activity with your four-legged companion.

THE STRONGEST RIMS THAN EVER: SLSON collapsible dog bowl series brings a new model this time, abandonned traditional assembled rims which are easy to fall apart or break. Choosed a completely new unique process, makes a sturdy structure between the rim and bowl. The rim will never break down. These pet travel bowls are stronger than ever.

FASHIONABLE MACARON COLORS: dog foldable bowls specially designed with macaron colors, soft and elegant. And the color of the bowl and rim is consistent, provide a more coordinated appearance than other collapsible bowls. Fashionable and attractive. Say goodbye to the dull black rim!

PORTABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT TRAVEL BOWLS: The collapsible design makes these bowls incredibly space-efficient - they fold flat for easy storage in your bag, car, or pocket. When needed, they quickly pop open to provide a sturdy vessel for food or water.The portable design makes it simple to offer your dog fresh water or a meal wherever your journey takes you. An essential accessories for pet parents on the move.

3 SIZE TO CHOOSE: Available in 3 different size S,M,L for small,medium,large breed dogs/cats. S: 5''x3.5''x2.1''(expanded), 0.5'' height(folded), each bowl holds 12 oz of water or 1.5 cups of pet food. M: 6.3''x4.3''x2.4''(expanded), 0.7'' height(folded),holds 22oz water or 2.8cups food. L: 6.8'' x 4.9'' x 2.9'' (expanded), 0.7'' height(folded), holds 34oz water or 4.2 cups food. Keep your furry friend hydrated and well-fed on the go with SLSON Collapsible Dog Travel Bowls.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bowl easy to carry in vehicles and appreciate its portability for travel. The material quality is good, and customers like its size. The durability receives mixed feedback, with some saying it's durable while others report it breaking after just three days of use.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bowl easy to carry in vehicles and convenient for various activities, with one customer mentioning it's perfect for hiking with their dog.

examples.snippet: This bowl is perfect for pups on the go! I love the color. The attached clip allows it to be added to a bag or leash easily....
Nice for Hiking with my dog
Perfect travel size, good material quality.
...So, I just put these into those bowls and HURRAY...easy to transport, easy to clean and pretty. Get them!

Clip is broken. Probably would have given it 5 stars if the clip wasn’t broken.
We used it as a water bowl for our cat on Christmas vacation. Stands up well, doesn't fall over. Clip is secure and works great.

authors_reviews.title: It's a very convenient, perfect, portable water bowl!
authors_reviews.text: I really like this. It folds up flat, and you can open it to the degree you want (ie: shallow, or deep). It's really easy to open and close, and silicone has no scent at all. Very convenient to take along to offer your pet water! I'm glad I bought it.
authors_reviews.author: Virtuallw

authors_reviews.title: Perfect traveling bowl!
authors_reviews.text: Pretty colors and great size! Put one in each car!
authors_reviews.author: jim wirtz (Shelly)

authors_reviews.title: A great accessory
authors_reviews.text: This bowl is perfect for pups on the go! I love the color. The attached clip allows it to be added to a bag or leash easily. It’s great for walks or traveling.
authors_reviews.author: Beth

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for Vet appointmnets and on the go
authors_reviews.text: How did it take me 5 years of having a dog before I bought these! These work wonders for my small Sr. Chi. And now that I have to take him to the vet a lot more often and sit for way too long in the lobby and waiting room, I can now give him water in a much more self contained and practitical way. Made well too!
authors_reviews.author: Little Filly
